task_description: crawl a public government open data portal, collect metadata for datasets matching a keyword, normalize metadata fields, save the dataset to CSV, generate a report, and print the most recently updated dataset
code:
echo "Fetching the first page of datasets from data.gov..."
curl -s https://catalog.data.gov/dataset?q=environment | grep -oP '(?<=href=")/dataset/[^\"]+' | grep '^/dataset/'

messages.content:
```bash
echo "Identifying potential government open data portals..."
curl -s https://www.data.gov/ | grep -oP '(?<=href=")[^"]+(?=")' | grep -E 'data\.gov' | sort -u | head -n 10
```
